title: [Abuse] Warning: Renegade GmbH, Vaduz
text: The Financial Market Authority (FMA) points out that Renegade GmbH, Dr. Grass-Strasse 12, 9490 Vaduz, is not licensed by the FMA and is therefore not supervised by the FMA. In particular, Renegade GmbH is not permitted to provide financial services requiring a license under Liechtenstein law.
